# Code Anchors: Registry Seeding

- `libs/portable-tools/src/seed-registry.ts` — seed mode: consumes the shared detection engine, does integer density-based parent grouping into two levels, renders a draft registry and a per-page suggestion list as marked draft files, and refuses when a registry already exists.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/seed-registry.spec.ts` — coverage of grouping, generic naming with member evidence, the refusal path, and byte-identical repeat runs.
- `libs/portable-tools/src/drift-advisory.ts` — the shared community-detection engine and member threshold seed imports rather than re-implementing.
- `libs/portable-tools/corpus/seed/` — the seed-mode corpus of fixture concept pages with no registry.
